requirement_produced.description: When BA produces requirement artifacts, each requirement must be traceable to identified stakeholder need

falsifiable_criteria_required.description: All acceptance criteria must be falsifiable and testable

current_state_grounded.description: Current state analysis must be grounded in evidence or explicit stakeholder confirmation

traced_all_requirements.description: Agent traced each requirement to identified stakeholder need

framed_falsifiable_criteria.description: Agent framed all acceptance criteria as falsifiable and testable

defined_measurable_fit.description: Agent defined fit criteria with measurable objective thresholds

no_untraced_requirement.description: Agent must not include requirements without stakeholder traceability

no_unfalsifiable_criteria.description: Agent must not frame acceptance criteria that cannot be falsified or tested

no_ungrounded_current_state.description: Agent must not assert current state without evidence or stakeholder confirmation
